use_cases: Displaying comparative metrics across multiple categories over time periods
Visualizing temperature or climate data distributions across geographic locations
Showing stacked proportional data like revenue breakdowns or resource allocation
ai_summary: A horizontal stacked bar chart component from Airbnb's visx visualization library that displays comparative data across multiple categories. Uses a clean minimalist design with purple color coding and interactive tooltips on hover. Ideal for showing proportional distributions or comparative metrics in dashboards and reports.
